query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email FROM users u WHERE u.email = 'cheikhanas.iaeste@gmail.com'; SELECT m.id, m.fromUserId, m.toUserId, m.subject, m.body, m.createdAt FROM messages m WHERE m.toUserId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'cheikhanas.iaeste@gmail.com') ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
